title: [Reasonable Accommodation] Does BHA always have the right to ask for verification of my disability and needs?
content:
**Q: Does BHA always have the right to ask for verification of my disability and needs?**

Not always, but the BHA does have the right to request information if it:Is necessary to verify that the Client meets the definition of a person with a disability;Describes the needed accommodation; andShows the relationship between the person’s disability and the need for the requested accommodation.
